ListAvailableResizeSpec.spec: Instance type. Exactly one of instance type, spec family ID, or instance ID must be specified.
ListAvailableResizeSpec.specId: Spec family ID. Exactly one of instance type, spec family ID, or instance ID must be specified.
ListAvailableResizeSpec.zone: Availability zone, named as "country-region-zone" in lowercase, e.g. "cn-bj-a" for Beijing Zone A. Required when spec or specId is provided.
ListAvailableResizeSpec.instanceIdList: List of instance IDs. Exactly one of instance type, spec family ID, or instance ID must be specified.
